meenakshi.name: Meenakshi Marine Exports
meenakshi.sector: Seafood export — frozen prawns (Vannamei, Black Tiger)
meenakshi.profile: Family-run prawn exporter. Historically US-heavy (≈62% of sales). Exports zero-rated under LUT, so it runs a GST refund position. Owner makes fast, cash-aware decisions and wants plain-language guidance.
key_facts: US is the largest market but softening — down ~30% over the last two months.
Top US buyer Gulf Coast Seafood owes ₹38L, 55 days overdue.
China and Vietnam are the growth markets the owner is weighing a pivot toward.
Registrations gate the pivot: selling to China needs GACC + MPEDA.

relationships.ca: Handles GST filing and export compliance — loop in for anything statutory.
relationships.cha: Customs House Agent — handles export paperwork per destination.
